title: Daily trading guide
author: sebitrader
selftext:
\[ Daily trades updates for education purposes\]

Sebi trader here. Today we captured 25 points & 47 points per lot in sensex in morning. 

Later we didn't trade anything, just observed market.

At last, ended trading jio finance put from 3.2 to 3.85...

All trades were done by proper SL & T. 

Lesson: Spending entire day market is bad, just set your strategy & execute. Either you hit SL or T, simple! 

For any query you can ask/ DM us.

Thank you, have a great day!
